caption:
Pisces, your soul's been crying out for validation, but have you ever stopped to listen?

Your emotional wounds run deep, but they're not your fault, they're just scars from a childhood that didn't understand your sensitivity.
You've been people-pleasing, trying to make everyone happy, but at what cost?
You've lost touch with your intuition, and it's time to get back in tune with your inner voice.
The pain of others has become your own, but it's time to set boundaries and prioritize your own healing.

It's time to break free from the chains of other people's opinions and expectations and rise into your true, authentic self.

Lucky number: 5
Lucky color: Turquoise
Today's vibe: EMPATHY

Take a deep breath, Pisces, and remember that you are enough, just as you are.

Music provided by sonican (https://pixabay.com/users/sonican-38947841/)

#pisces #astrology #horoscope #emotionalhealing

script.hook: Pisces, your soul's been crying out for validation, but have you ever stopped to listen?
body: Your emotional wounds run deep, but they're not your fault, they're just scars from a childhood that didn't understand your sensitivity.
You've been people-pleasing, trying to make everyone happy, but at what cost?
You've lost touch with your intuition, and it's time to get back in tune with your inner voice.
The pain of others has become your own, but it's time to set boundaries and prioritize your own healing.
You've been searching for a sense of belonging, but true belonging starts within.
You've been carrying the weight of others' expectations, but it's time to shed the skin of others' opinions and rise into your true self.
You've been hiding behind a mask of 'fine' when in reality, you're struggling to keep it together.
You've been waiting for someone else to fix your problems, but the truth is, you're the only one who can.
You've been silencing your own voice to avoid conflict, but it's time to speak your truth and stand up for yourself.
You've been stuck in a cycle of self-doubt, but it's time to break free and trust your inner wisdom.
You've been living someone else's dream, but it's time to create your own and make it a reality.
script.reveal: It's time to break free from the chains of other people's opinions and expectations and rise into your true, authentic self.
script.cta: Take a deep breath, Pisces, and remember that you are enough, just as you are.
script.affirmation: I trust myself and my inner wisdom to guide me towards my highest good.
